name: Roll the Bones
effect: Roll three D6's and resolve an effect for each result. On a roll of 1 You lose 5 HP. On a roll of 2 you gain three random Stat Reductions. On a roll of 3 you gain three random Stat Increases. On a roll of 4 you Heal 5 HP. On a roll of 5 a random target besides yourself Heals 5 HP. On a roll of 6 use Metronome four times and pick one result to immediately perform.
description: Do you like gambling with a side of gambling?
